flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Central State College fell 69% between 2006 and 2009 (50.1% → 15.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at North Central State College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Central State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at North Central State College fell 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.3k → $8.3k).
